name: auto-openclaw
description: Local OpenClaw deployment helper with a built-in config editor.

scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check public/js/login.js && node --check public/js/app/index.mjs && node --check public/js/app/api.mjs && node --check public/js/app/actions.mjs && node --check public/js/app/constants.mjs && node --check public/js/app/designer.mjs && node --check public/js/app/dom.mjs && node --check public/js/app/render.mjs && node --check public/js/app/state.mjs
